title: Capitalism
description:
A mod I created to practice and learn how to mod with Fabric.
Mine, dig, hunt mobs, kill animals, and rob villagers' houses to get money. Craft this money into larger amounts using a crafting table. This money can be made into emeralds. (see gallery)
body:
# Make money in Minecraft! #
Dig, mine, hunt mobs, kill animals, and raid villagers' houses to get money. This money can be crafted into larger amounts
5 pennies -> 1 nickel
2 nickels -> 1 dime
2 dimes -> 1 quarter
5 quarters -> 1 one dollar bill
2/5 one dollar bills -> 1 two/five dollar bill
2 five dollar bills -> 1 ten dollar bill
2 ten dollar bills -> 1 twenty dollar bill
5 ten dollar bills -> 1 fifty dollar bill

Money can be processed in a stonecutter to break it down into smaller amounts.
One dollar bills can be crafted into emeralds.
*this mod doesn't add that much/have much complexity since it was my first mod and I'm still learning how to do things
(see gallery)
